Test Description: Checks default reset values and masked write/read behavior for registers in addr_array (e.g., MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8..MIZAR_GPIO_GPIO_DIN_GROUP4) using read_mask_array, write_mask_array, default_value_array, skip_array, and skip_rst_array.
Test Steps/Procedure: Default value check: iterate i=0..CNT-1; get addr from addr_array[i]; if skip_rst_array[i]==1 then skip; if read_mask_array[i]==0x00000000 then skip; read data_rd=read_reg(addr); compute data=(data_rd & 0xFFFFFFFE); compare data to default_value_array[i]; on mismatch increment def_fail_cnt and log failure, else log pass. Write/read check: for each test pattern data_wr in {0xFFFFFFFF,0xAAAAAAAA,0x55555555,0xF5F5F5F5,0xA5A5A5A5,0xFFFF0000}, iterate i=0..CNT-1; addr=addr_array[i]; if skip_array[i]==1 then skip; if write_mask_array[i]==0x00000000 then skip; otherwise write_reg(addr, (data_wr & write_mask_array[i])); Then readback phase: for each i, if skip_array[i]==1 then skip; if write_mask_array[i]==0x00000000 then skip; if read_mask_array[i]==0x00000000 then skip; else compute data_rd=(read_reg(addr) & read_mask_array[i]); compute wr_n=(write_mask_array[i] ^ 0xFFFFFFFF); compute exp_val=((data_wr & read_mask_array[i] & write_mask_array[i]) | (wr_n & read_mask_array[i] & default_value_array[i])); if data_rd==exp_val then log PASS, else increment wr_fail_cnt and log failure. At end of test_case: if (def_fail_cnt>0 || wr_fail_cnt>0) then finish(1) else finish(0).
Validation / Acceptance Criteria: Checks: data after reset masked by 0xFFFFFFFE must equal default_value_array[i]; during write/read, data_rd must equal exp_val; failure counters def_fail_cnt and wr_fail_cnt accumulate mismatches; test ends with finish(0) on success or finish(>0) on error. Printed PASS/Failed messages are emitted accordingly.

Test Description: Enables negedge interrupts for GPIOs 8–39 by programming MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8 + (i*4) and group enable MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1, drives external signal via 0xA0243FFC to create falling edges, and validates per-pin and group interrupt behavior using MIZAR_GPIO_GPIO_INTR_RAW_STCLR1 and MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1.
Test Steps/Procedure: Initialization: optionally enable GIC (IRQ 87 for GPIO0 or 88 for GPIO1); enable system interrupt through MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1 with LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1_GPIO{0/1}_INTR; drive 0xA0243FFC to 0xFFFFFFFF. Configure per-pin control for i=0..31: addr1=MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8+(i*4); write (bit20=1, bit18=1, bit16=1); wait_on(10). For each pin i: set wr_val=(1<<i); clear raw status by writing wr_val to MIZAR_GPIO_GPIO_INTR_RAW_STCLR1; enable only that pin in MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1 with wr_val; wait_on(10); set int_pend=1; drive 0xA0243FFC to 0xFFFFFFFF then wait_on(30) then drive 0xA0243FFC to ~wr_val to create a falling edge only on pin i; poll with timeout (5000 iterations, wait_on(10) each) until int_pend==0, else declare timeout error and increment test_err. ISR (Default_IRQHandler): compute local_wr=(1<<i); set int_pend=0; optionally drive 0xA0243FFC to 0xFFFFFFFF; read per-pin rdata from MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8+(i*4); if bit0 set then increment test_err; if bit1 is 1 then read group status MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1 and require (rdata_grp & local_wr)!=0; then clear per-pin raw using MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8+(i*4) with bits20 and16 set; clear group raw via MIZAR_GPIO_GPIO_INTR_RAW_STCLR1 with local_wr; read MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1 and require it to become 0; clear system raw via MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1 with LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1_GPIO{0/1}_INTR and then GIC_ClearIRQ(87/88); else (if per-pin bit1 was not set) increment test_err. Finish with finish(test_err).
Validation / Acceptance Criteria: Explicit checks: timeout detection in main loop; in ISR, (rdata & 0x1)==0, (MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1 & (1<<i))!=0 on entry, after clearing raw statuses MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1==0x0, and system RAW_STCR1 bit for GPIO0/GPIO1 is cleared after write. Overall result returned by finish(test_err).

Test Description: Enables posedge interrupts on all pads (GPIOs 8–39) by writing 0x00020000 to MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8 + (i*4), configures MIZAR_GPIO_GPIO_IO_CTRL_GROUP[1..4] for input, enables MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1, drives 0xA0243FFC to create rising edges, and validates group and system interrupt handling.
Test Steps/Procedure: Initialization: optionally enable GIC (IRQ 87/88) and enable system interrupt via MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1 with LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1_GPIO{0/1}_INTR. For i=0..31 program per-pin control MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8+(i*4)=0x00020000 to enable posedge detect (bit17=1). wait_on(10). Program MIZAR_GPIO_GPIO_IO_CTRL_GROUP1..4=0x000000FF to set GPIOs 8–39 in input mode; wait_on(10). Enable group interrupts by writing 0xFFFFFFFF to MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1. For each i: drive 0xA0243FFC to 0x00000000 (low), wait_on(10), set int_pend=1, then drive 0xA0243FFC to 0xFFFFFFFF (rising edge); poll with timeout (2000 iterations, wait_on(10) each) until int_pend==0, else log timeout and increment test_err; afterwards optionally drive low again and wait_on(10). ISR (Default_IRQHandler): compute wr_val=(1<<i); set int_pend=0; read group status from MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1; temporarily mask group by writing 0x00000000 to MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1 during service; require group status nonzero on entry; clear per-pin raw by writing 0x00010000 to each MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8+(j*4) and wait_on(2); read MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1 and require it to become 0; clear system RAW_STCR1 for GPIO0/GPIO1 and verify by reading MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1 that the respective bit is cleared; re-enable group by writing 0xFFFFFFFF to MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1; clear GIC (87/88). Finish with finish(test_err).
Validation / Acceptance Criteria: Explicit checks: timeout detection in main loop; ISR requires MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1 nonzero before clear; after clearing per-pin raw, MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1==0x0; system RAW_STCR1 bit for GPIO0/GPIO1 is cleared after write; overall result via finish(test_err).
